'''Yinchorri attack ships''' were the primary [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] of the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]]. They were similar in size to [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] or [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]]. They were not actually built by or for the Yinchorri. The Yinchorri stole them from the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]]. These ships were used to defend the [[Yinchorri system]] and to [[Battle of Mayvitch 7|attack]] [[Mayvitch 7]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 4|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 4]]
*[[Star Wars (1998) 40|''Star Wars'' (1998) 40]] {{Flash}}
